mods.note: tier-gating engine: items/recipes/blocks/entities/dimensions locked behind stages, FTB Teams+Quests integration for later phases
Tier 1 'dumb storage': link chests into a browsable terminal, patched to iron-tier via KubeJS (stock recipes need diamond+ender_pearl+glowstone)
Create Crafts & Additions - Alternator (kinetic->FE) and Electric Motor (FE->kinetic), unlocked at Brass Age to power Refined Storage

browsable storage network, explicitly named in instructions.md; moved to Brass Age unlock (needs Nether Quartz + diamond-tier processor, both available there), energy requirement kept on and powered by Create's own Alternator
recipe/loot scripting used for the storage tier patches here, and for the full recipe-gating pass in Phase 9
Pufferfish's Skills - RPG skill tree framework, categories authored in pack/kubejs/data/puffish_skills/
Pufferfish's Attributes - mining/pickaxe/sprinting speed, sword/ranged damage, bow/crossbow projectile speed etc used by our skill categories
